style_effects: Flickering translucent purple mist particles drift slowly around the ghost-type Squirtle, elongating shadows bending unnaturally as if warped by an unseen force. Its aura pulses with a cold, eerie violet light that casts distorted reflections on nearby surfaces, while the faint energy pulses visible through its semi-transparent skin emit a soft, ghostly blue-white glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
